final:
module RefModule(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [8:0] sum
);reg [8:0] carry;

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        sum <= 0;
        carry <= 0;
    end else begin
        {carry, sum} <= a + b + carry;
    end
end

endmodule
